name_en: 🆕 Top Quality Replica✨M82961 Blue Denim Key Coin Purse Series. This zip coin purse is crafted from Monogram jacquard denim, accented with contrasting calfskin trim. It reinterprets the classic Monogram DLd pattern using jacquard fabric technology and creates a stonewashed denim effect. 12 x 7 x 1.5 cm.
